message:
chore(beads): sync issue graph state after multi-agent updates

Updates .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect latest bead-state transitions and notes generated
through this session's coordination loop.

Highlights captured in tracker state include:
- wa-1360 notes refresh for sharding config/client/documentation slices
- wa-sx55 status progression and closeout metadata updates
- additional synchronized note/status updates produced by concurrent agents

Why:
- Keeps the local-first beads source-of-truth aligned with the actual implementation
  and coordination activity before push.
